claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled modal dialog or embedded region contains an editable combobox and owned listbox with grouped commands and nested pages.
semantics.rolePolicy: Modal containment/restoration applies only to modal presentation. Embedded mode has region semantics and never traps or restores focus. Execution preview is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Opens a child page or executes the active leaf once.
Returns from a child page, or closes and restores focus in modal mode.
Cycles only within modal presentation; embedded mode keeps document tab order.

nonColor: Text, structure, shortcut labels, and disabled state accompany color.
responsive: Modal and embedded presentations reflow at narrow widths and use logical properties; manual evidence remains incomplete.
consumerResponsibilities: Control global shortcut registration outside this component.
Own async search transport and route effects; navigationAdapter only receives executed leaf commands.
Provide localized commands and explain destructive effects before use.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
